title: [ExpectedException] should be avoided
description: It should be clear to a casual reader what code a test is testing and what results are expected. Unfortunately, that’s not usually the case with the ExpectedException attribute since an exception could be thrown from almost any line in the method. This rule detects MSTest and NUnit ExpectedException attribute.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

never_trigger_on: String literals or documentation that mention ExpectedException
logic.reasoning: Detects usage of [ExpectedException] attribute which is discouraged in favor of Assert.Throws or similar assertion methods. The scanner extracts attributes as CallExpression nodes with name '[ExpectedException'. Pattern matches the attribute name. Exclusions prevent false positives from comments or documentation.

should_not_trigger: // Don't use ExpectedException, use Assert.Throws instead
